The '''DR-X55''' was a [[lift-mine]] made by [[Norsam Corp.]] The [[Mine/Legends|mine]] could detect enemy vehicles 100 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] away, and alter its altitude to intercept the target. It had a maximum flight ceiling of five hundred meters, and detonated when a target was within three meters.<ref name="CRFG" />

{{Weapon-stub}}

==Appearances==
[[File:DRXMine.jpg|200px|thumb|Mines such as these were used throughout the time of the Galactic Civil War]]
